## Description

## Why this resource matters to Houston/77084 routing Lee College SBDC - Baytown is relevant to the Houston-area SBDC search context. One of the four SBA 77084 search results; likely best for East Harris/Chambers/Liberty rather than west Houston. ## Service area

## Key information

- ## Why this resource matters to Houston/77084 routing
- Lee College SBDC - Baytown is relevant to the Houston-area SBDC search context. One of the four SBA 77084 search results; likely best for East Harris/Chambers/Liberty rather than west Houston.
- ## Service area
- Chambers, East Harris, and Liberty counties
- ## Contact
- Address: 909 Decker Drive, Suite 105, Baytown, TX 77520
- Phone: 281-425-6309
